title: Chapter 2320: Embracing Sun Rouxi
content:
Chapter 2320: Embracing Sun Rouxi

After Sun Rouxi invited Tian Yang into her room, she gently pulled him down onto the bed with her, her voice soft as she whispered, "Be gentle... this is my first time."

Seeing her bashful expression, Tian Yang felt warmth surge through him, as though a raging flame had been lit within his heart.

Without any delay, Tian Yang helped Sun Rouxi undress before removing his own clothes.

"You’re... beautiful," Tian Yang muttered as he gazed upon her flawless figure that looked as though it was sculpted by the Heavens themselves.

Her slender figure, porcelain-like skin, and a gaze so alluring it could soften even the coldest heart made her undeniably captivating.

Sun Rouxi was certainly beautiful, though not in a way that demanded attention at first glance like Ren Xia. Instead, she possessed a quiet allure—one that deepened and grew more enchanting the longer one looked.

"Stop staring so much..." Sun Rouxi muttered as she covered her bashful expression with her arms, but her subconscious actions left her twin peaks exposed.

With Sun Rouxi’s naked breasts beckoning his attention, Tian Yang could no longer control himself and immediately buried his face in them.

"Ah?!" Sun Rouxi released a surprised moan at the sudden sensation, her entire body shivering in delight.

"Mmm~!"

Sun Rouxi gently bit her lips as Tian Yang feasted upon her body like a starving beast.

Many minutes later, once Sun Rouxi was completely soaked downstairs, Tian Yang readied his sword and positioned it before her cave.

His gaze met hers, and after a moment of silence, Sun Rouxi quietly nodded her head.

After confirming her desire, Tian Yang no longer hesitated and pushed his sword into her entrance, penetrating deeply and drawing blood.

"Aaah~!" Sun Rouxi released her loudest moan yet.

"Tian Yang~!" She suddenly wrapped her arms around his body and embraced him tightly, her body trembling nonstop.

Tian Yang embraced her back before moving his body. His movements were slow and gentle at first, but as pleasure consumed him, his pace gradually quickened.

Even though this was her first time, Sun Rouxi showcased surprisingly high endurance, and the two of them went on to cultivate nonstop for the next several days.

"If I were to go back in time and tell my past self about today, I doubt she’d believe me, even if beaten to death," Sun Rouxi suddenly joked as they rested on the bed, their body soaked in sweat.

Tian Yang chuckled before agreeing with her.

After that day, the two of them would always visit the bedroom after their study session, which became even more frequent.

"Congratulations. It looks like two of you have finally become real partners," Jing Ruye said to Sun Rouxi after noticing a change in her aura.

"Thank you... and I mean for pushing me forward. If it weren’t for you, I probably wouldn’t have been able to be honest with myself, let alone approach Tian Yang."

"Don’t sweat it. This is what sworn sisters are for," she chuckled.

"..."

"What is it?" Jing Ruye asked when Sun Rouxi suddenly went silent.

"You... Were you serious before? When you said that you fancied Tian Yang."

"Huh?" Jing Ruye’s eyes widened at her unexpected inquiry.

"I know you likely said those things to force me to act, but if they were your true feelings... I wouldn’t mind if you also approached him."

"..."

After hearing her words, it was Jing Ruye’s turn to fall silent.

A moment later, she shook her head with a faint smile. "While it’s true that Tian Yang is a very charming man, and I wouldn’t mind getting closer to him, my feelings aren’t as deep or resolute as yours. Even though we live in the same place and see each other often, we’re little more than acquaintances."

"If I were to approach him with such half-hearted feelings, it would be an insult to both you and him."

"If that’s how you really feel, I won’t press further," said Sun Rouxi.

Time continued to flow.

One hundred years... three hundred years... one thousand years.

"Now that I have full mastery of the soul cultivation technique, I just need to actually refine the technique," said Tian Yang. "And in order to do that, I will need to..."

"Enter seclusion, right?" Sun Rouxi continued with a calm smile.

He nodded and said, "Unfortunately, I don’t know when I’ll finish. It could take a year or a thousand years."

"Don’t worry. No matter how long it takes, I’ll be here to wait for you."

Before entering seclusion, Tian Yang spent a few months with Sun Rouxi and Ren Xia. Of course, they spent most of their time in the bedroom.

A few years after Tian Yang entered seclusion, Ren Xia decided to leave the world to see if there was anything new happening outside.

As Ren Xia wandered through a nearby city, she overheard a conversation between some pedestrians, and this piece of information greatly bewildered her.

"Wanna hear something interesting? Apparently, the crimson barrier that sealed off the Giant’s Continent for tens of thousands of years suddenly vanished."

"What...?" Ren Xia’s entire body stiffened the moment she heard such words.

"Hey! Tell me everything you know about that!" Ren Xia approached these pedestrians and retrieved a handful of spirit stones to show them.

The man swallowed nervously at the sight of the dazzling spirit stones and immediately continued, revealing everything he knew to her.

"I heard it from a friend of mine—a sailing merchant who frequently crosses that area," the man said. "He told me that on his return trip, the crimson dome that was always along his route had suddenly vanished."

"How long ago was this?"

"He told me about it three days ago, but it’d been almost two months since he saw it."

Once the man had revealed everything he knew, Ren Xia paid him and immediately wandered off to learn more about the situation. However, even after weeks of asking around, she was unable to find any more information on the Giant’s Continent. Therefore, she decided to visit the place herself to confirm the rumors.
